name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M44887 Premium Enhanced Version (Quality upgrade. Counter-sync electronic chip, gift bag, protective paper, foil electronic tag, certificate). Leather is from the authentic factory in Italy, Grade A (Premium Authentic): The so-called premium authentic lies in quality, hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, Grade A output, photos match the product, full set of packaging as shown. Size: 26x26x17.5CM🌟
